{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Throne of Karosha
| introduced = lh-03-the-knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Throne of Karosha]] is a political entity or seat of power.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c13">''The Knight'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|“You don’t work for the Throne of Karosha as a spy, do you?”<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c13" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
